on_screen_text: Speak fast and clear: I want to learn English because I have big dreams. I want to have a good job, earn money, and help my family. I want to be proud of myself. I want to speak English well, travel to many countries, and meet new people. I know that English is the key to a better life. Sometimes, I feel tired. Sometimes, I feel lazy. Sometimes, I look at English books and feel bored. But I tell myself: 'Keep going.' Even if I practice only 10 minutes today with MySivi, it will make me better. Even if I make mistakes, MySivi's AI teacher will help me learn from them. I don't need to be perfect. I just need to try. Step by step, day by day MySivi helps me grow. When I feel sad, I remember why I started. I remember my goals. I open MySivi, take a deep breath, and begin again. Learning English is not easy, but MySivi makes it worth it. Every new sentence I speak is a small victory. Every conversation with the AI brings me closer to my dreams. I don't compare myself to others. I only compare myself to who I was yesterday. And MySivi shows me my progress every day. I believe in myself. I know I can do it. And one day, I will look back and say: 'Yes, I did it. I didn't give up.' So today, I choose to keep going with MySivi. Because my future depends on what I do now. And I want that future to be bright. You can also download MySivi and start your English Journey at Just ₹3. It has already helped 50 lakh+ people learn English. Download MySivi Now. Your bright future starts today.
summary: A motivational text-based ad encouraging viewers to persist in learning English with MySivi. It highlights the app's AI teacher, daily 10-minute practice, and progress tracking. The ad ends with a call to download the app for ₹3.
